title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to pull, create, and run large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, …) with a simple REST/GRPC API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client/SDK that wraps Ollama’s REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, and create operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical API surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client library providing fluent builders for chat, generate, pull, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + LangChain.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Community-enhanced Node CLI for interactive chatting, model management, and REPL with syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model for offline AI pair-programming.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any channel with slash commands and conversation threads.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama services, pull models, and run inference tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that exposes Ollama as injectable services for chat, embedding, and tool use.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C#/.NET client with strongly-typed models and both sync & async APIs for chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models inside BPMN workflows for human-task summarisation or email drafting.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir library wrapping Ollama with GenServer behaviour for back-pressure and streaming tokens.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client using std.http to interact with Ollama’s REST API; includes build.zig for easy integration.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with Ollama” pane to query local models on your vault for summarisation or Q&A.
